memberdef.definition: readonly unsafe ref readonly MR.Vector2i MR.Matrix2i.this[int row]
memberdef.name: this[int row]

briefdescription.para: row access Generated from method MR::Matrix2i::operator[].
Copy contents from a wrapper class to this struct.
returns a matrix that scales uniformly Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.scale.
returns a matrix that has its own scale along each axis Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.scale.
constructs a matrix from its 2 rows Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.fromRows.

constructs a matrix from its 2 columns; use this method to get the matrix that transforms basis vectors ( plusX, plusY ) into vectors ( x, y ) respectively Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.fromColumns.
x = a * b Generated from function MR::operator*.
product of two matrices Generated from function MR::operator*.
initializes matrix from its 2 rows Generated from constructor MR.Matrix2i.Matrix2i.
column access Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.col.
computes trace of the matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.trace.
compute sum of squared matrix elements Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.normSq.
computes determinant of the matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.det.
computes transposed matrix Generated from method MR.Matrix2i.transposed.
arbitrary 2x2 matrix Generated from class MR.Matrix2i. This is the by-value version of the struct.
